title: Collapse one level of nested case in MyApp.Auth.refresh/1
prompt: Refactor only the `refresh/1` function from test_fixtures/nested_case_auth.ex into a `with` expression. The three-level nested `case` should become a three-clause `with`. Preserve the existing error atoms: `{:error, :user_deleted}` for a missing user, and pass through decode/validation errors as-is. Output only the `refresh/1` function inside `defmodule MyApp.Auth do ... end` (with the needed aliases).
tier_rationale: Classic 3-level case collapse. The `with` form is the textbook target. No conflicting constraints.
